# Config


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## Environment variables

Make a copy of `.env.example` as `.env` and fill in details of the API
keys.

- `YOUTUBE_API_KEY` – API key for accessing YouTube Data API.
- `GENAI_API_KEY` – API key for accessing Generative AI services. Ex:
  Gemini from Google.

<!-- -->

    YOUTUBE_API_KEY=
    GENAI_API_KEY=

## Data directory

Data will be written into `sentimeter/data/` directory.

    ../data/

    0 directories, 0 files

## Configuration

YouTube channels to fetch comments from and measure the overall
sentiment.

    {
        "youtube": {
            "channels": [
                "IndianFootball",
                "playmakerindia",
                "DhanrajDhurve",
                "meharsodhi11"
            ]
        }
    }
